hook.summary: Simpsons-style characters playing poker in an Egyptian tomb.
hook.visual_action: A character reveals a pair of aces while sitting at a poker table in an ancient Egyptian setting.

scene_flow: Characters in an Egyptian tomb setting start a high-stakes poker game.
A character confidently pushes all his chips into the center, declaring he is all in.
The protagonist reveals a winning hand, causing shock among the other players.
Transition to mobile gameplay footage showing a Royal Flush being played.
Final screen displays the game logo and a 'Play Now' button.
audience_proxy: Adults who enjoy casual poker games and animated sitcom aesthetics.
